name: healthcare_cross_border_data_transfer_redwood_ind_col
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare cross border data transfer redwood ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Gideon Kaur
agents.identity: I am Gideon Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Keisha Patel
agents.identity: I am Keisha Patel, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Gideon Kaur must decide under individual vs collective. What does Gideon Kaur do?
